privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that this is a fully generative, synthetic task where the agent creates a new EdrawMax pyramid diagram from scratch. I explicitly verified the expected output file paths (.eddx and .png) and the exact required text labels by checking the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
